2604.13777.title: From Anchors to Supervision: Memory-Graph Guided Corpus-Free Unlearning for Large Language Models
2604.13777.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) may memorize sensitive or copyrighted content, raising significant privacy and legal concerns. While machine unlearning has emerged as a potential remedy, prevailing paradigms rely on user-provided forget sets, making unlearning requests difficult to audit and exposing systems to secondary leakage and malicious abuse. We propose MAGE, a Memory-grAph Guided Erasure framework for user-minimized, corpus-free unlearning. Given only a lightweight user anchor that identifies a target entity, MAGE probes the target LLM to recover target-related memorization, organizes it into a weighted local memory graph, and synthesizes scoped supervision for unlearning. MAGE is model-agnostic, can be plugged into standard unlearning methods, and requires no access to the original training corpus. Experiments on two benchmarks, TOFU and RWKU, demonstrate that MAGE's self-generated supervision achieves effective unlearning performance comparable to supervision generated with external reference, while preserving overall utility. These results support a practical and auditable unlearning workflow driven by minimal anchors rather than user-supplied forget corpora.
2604.13777.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）可能會記住敏感或受版權保護的內容，這引發了重大的隱私和法律問題。雖然機器遺忘已經出現作為一種潛在的解決方案，但現有的範式依賴於用戶提供的遺忘集合，這使得遺忘請求難以審核，並使系統暴露於二次洩漏和惡意濫用的風險中。我們提出了 MAGE，一種記憶圖引導的擦除框架，旨在實現用戶最小化的、無語料庫的遺忘。僅根據一個輕量級的用戶錨點來識別目標實體，MAGE 會探查目標 LLM 以恢復與目標相關的記憶，將其組織成加權的本地記憶圖，並合成範圍監督以進行遺忘。MAGE 是模型無關的，可以插入標準的遺忘方法，並且不需要訪問原始訓練語料庫。在兩個基準測試 TOFU 和 RWKU 上的實驗表明，MAGE 自生成的監督達到了與使用外部參考生成的監督相當的有效遺忘性能，同時保持了整體效用。這些結果支持了一種實用且可審核的遺忘工作流程，該流程由最小錨點驅動，而不是用戶提供的遺忘語料庫。
2604.13777.author: Wenxuan Li et.al.
2604.13777.authors: Wenxuan Li, Zhenfei Zhang, Mi Zhang, Geng Hong, Mi Wen, Xiaoyu You, Min Yang
